steps.t: Gárnoth's Farm is south of Forlaw. When taking the road south out of Forlaw, the first road to the right goes to Gárnoth's Farm.
Somewhere on Gárnoth's Farm there could be signs of Núrzum having been there. Gárnoth's Farm is south of Forlaw. When taking the road south out of For…
Núrzum recently made a trail through Gárnoth's Farm. The path of footprints starts near the road toward Gárnoth's Farm.
Cyneberg is keeping Gárwig company in Lornsettle, the mead hall of Forlaw.
